title: Aslan Bacanak
overview: Selim, a minibus driver, moves to a new neighborhood. After a while, he falls in love with Zeynep, who lives in the neighborhood, and proposes to her. She accepts on the condition that he convinces her brother. Selim will try to convince her brother Halim, a bully, so that he can marry Zeynep.
